rationale: cmd_invoke() already dispatches commands/*.md targets identically to skills (6 of 9 ENH-2504 _VERIFIER_SKILLS entries are command-backed and pass tests); extract_tagged_json and record_verdict_event are directly reusable templates. Option B's new module repeats the central-helper shape ENH-2504 explicitly rejected.
rule: Option A: extend cmd_invoke() with a _REVIEWER_SKILLS frozenset and _record_review() helper (ENH-2504 dispatcher precedent), not a new review_events.py module
alternatives_rejected: Option B: per-skill markdown directives + new scripts/little_loops/review_events.py module
